title: LE12 5AL, STURDEE POULTRY FARMS LIMITED environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3132NJ/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: STURDEE POULTRY FARMS LIMITED   Installation name: Wheeler Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/TP3132NJ/S004   "
